claim: Explorer evidence is verified: boundary audit implementation is factual, code references are accurate, tests exist and pass, artifact directories confirm multiple dispatch executions, and dirty working tree confirms status_quo claim.

evidence.summary: gitFiles() runs git ls-files -co --exclude-standard -z exactly as cited by explorer
evidence.why: Verifies explorer code citation accuracy for git-backed file discovery

evidence.summary: walkFiles() implements fallback directory walk with excluded directories
evidence.why: Verifies explorer code citation accuracy for non-git fallback coverage

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot() combines git and walk results with allowed root exclusion
evidence.why: Verifies core boundary audit implementation matches explorer description

evidence.summary: Boundary snapshots captured before and after agent execution excluding output_dir
evidence.why: Verifies runtime enforcement happens as explorer claimed

evidence.summary: Boundary violations converted to BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers and disable readiness
evidence.why: Verifies enforcement mechanism blocks PRD readiness on violations

evidence.summary: Test verifies untracked file mutations are detected and blocked
evidence.why: Verifies test exists and covers git ls-files untracked coverage

evidence.summary: Test verifies .gitignore-excluded file mutations are detected
evidence.why: Verifies gitignored boundary enforcement works as claimed

evidence.summary: Test verifies non-git fallback walk detects modifications while excluding artifacts
evidence.why: Verifies fallback coverage and artifact exclusion behavior

evidence.summary: 19 evidence dispatch artifact directories exist from previous runs
evidence.why: Confirms dispatch system has executed multiple times as explorer claimed

evidence.summary: 60+ modified files confirm dirty working tree status
evidence.why: Verifies status_quo claim that evidence dispatch exists in dirty state

risks: No evidence explorer confused assumptions with facts
No evidence explorer cited incorrect line numbers or file paths
No evidence explorer misrepresented test coverage or implementation

result.notes: All explorer evidence verified as factual with accurate code citations and proper separation of implementation facts from missing stress-testing evidence. Ready for PRD cross_check.
